movie.title: Beyond Fear
movie.description: The true story of Stephanie Slater, a British estate agent who was kidnapped, raped, and held for ransom by Michael Sams, who imprisoned her in a coffin-like box for eight days.

movie.title: Birtay Desire
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: California On The Brink: The San Andreas Mega Quake
movie.description: California on Fire is a video and sound artwork by southern Californian artist Jeff Frost. It uses the catastrophic effects of climate change as a backdrop to examine the experience of grief and loss. The film's five chapters are the stages of grief: denial, anger, bargaining, sadness, and acceptance. To create California on Fire, Frost trained as a firefighter, gained full access to more than 70 wildfires, and shot 350,000 photos over five years. It has been featured on Artnet, Time Magazine, National Geographic, PBS Newshour, and many others.

movie.title: Full
movie.description: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the U.S.-Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

movie.title: The Price Of Losing Her
movie.description: Nightclub singer Joan Gordon runs away from her gangster boyfriend to become a mail-order bride to a struggling North Dakota farmer. Their relationship has a rocky start, but just as Joan realizes she's developing feelings for her husband, her old boyfriend arrives to win her back.

movie.title: Epic: An Entire Army Advances Across River, Unaware Invisible Archers Waiting To Slaughter Them

movie.title: Survival Against All Odds: The Forest Rescue
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: The Boy I Hurt
movie.description: When his family moves from their home in Berlin to a strange new house in Poland, young Bruno befriends Shmuel, a boy who lives on the other side of the fence where everyone seems to be wearing striped pajamas. Unaware of Shmuel's fate as a Jewish prisoner or the role his own Nazi father plays in his imprisonment, Bruno embarks on a dangerous journey inside the camp's walls.

movie.title: [English Audio] Mistress Became Bride, But Ex-Wife’S Red Dress Entrance Stunned The Entire Ceremony!
movie.description: Wednesday Addams is sent to Nevermore Academy, a bizarre boarding school where she attempts to master her psychic powers, stop a monstrous killing spree of the town citizens, and solve the supernatural mystery that affected her family 25 years ago — all while navigating her new relationships. Download/watch wednesday dual audio [English-Hindi] for free copy and paste this url in your browser https://cinematicotaku.com/anime/wednesday/

movie.title: The Ultimate Storm Is Coming
movie.description: Despite his best intentions, billionaire Jason Stevens can’t find enough time to keep his beloved Alexia a priority. But when he discovers his late grandfather’s journal, he is transported back to Red Stevens’ incredible world. With everything he loves hanging in the balance, Jason Stevens hopes the past will prepare him well for the future.

movie.title: Western
movie.description: A group of German construction workers set out for a foreign construction site in the Bulgarian province. The strange country awakens adventure feelings among the men. At the same time, they are confronted with their prejudices and mistrust. For two of the men, a nearby village becomes the stage for a competition for the recognition and favor of the village.

movie.title: [English Audio] Mermaid Princess Kidnapped,Sea King Leads Tidal Army To Destroy Entire Royal Capital

movie.title: Cape Cod Affair
movie.description: Short. A remote house in the Cape Cod area, october 1962…

movie.title: Homesick
movie.description: When Charlotte, 27, meets her brother Henrik, 35, for the first time as an adult, it becomes an encounter without boundaries, between two people who don't know what a normal family is. How does sibling love manifest itself if you have never experienced it before? Homesick is an unusual family drama about seeking a family, and breaking every rule to be one.

movie.title: Action:City Overrun By The Undead,Special Forces Family Fights For Their Last Chance To Survive
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: Before It'S Too Late
movie.description: “Before It’s Too Late” is a short film about teenagers facing bullying, heartbreak, and the pressures of growing up. Peter, a sensitive and struggling teen, and Lara, his friend, navigate the challenges of friendship, relationships, and personal hardships. Through moments of despair and hope, the story highlights the importance of support, understanding, and faith in Jesus Christ during life’s toughest moments.

movie.title: Full
movie.description: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the U.S.-Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

movie.title: . Riding High
movie.description: Popular comedian Claude Dampier is seen at his best here, as he disrupts the sedate peace of Victorian England in his attempt to help a village blacksmith win both a bicycle race and the girl. Can the blacksmith's new bicycle design triumph over his rival's trusty penny farthing?

movie.title: The River Why
movie.description: A young man abandons his family for a solitary life of fly-fishing. His goal was to find his own way in the fishing world and thereby find himself and love.

movie.title: Blood Horizon
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: Indiscretion Of An American Wife
movie.description: An American diplomat's wife meets an Italian vintner at an embassy soirée. He sees her as more than just her "husband's hostess". Her husband has been so focused on advancing his career that he has forgotten how to see her as a woman, which the Italian reminds her that she is.

movie.title: Isolation Protocol
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: Secret In The Graveyard
movie.description: In 1860s Paris, a young woman, Therese, is trapped in a loveless marriage to the sickly Camille by her domineering aunt, Madame Raquin. She spends her days behind the counter of a small shop and her evenings watching Madame play dominos with an eclectic group. After she meets her husband’s alluring friend, Laurent, she embarks on an illicit affair that leads to tragic consequences. Based on Emile Zola’s novel, Thérèse Raquin.

movie.title: Silent Intrusion
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: Action: Undercover Agent Nearly Killed, Grabs A Knife And Turns The Tables In A Bloody Massacre
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: Dark Soul
movie.description: Enrico Russo rapes and slaughters children. A magistrate, a policeman and a psychiatrist try to arrest him, but it’s too difficult to identify a cancer that hides itself behind a normal life. Then, one day, Enrico meets Andrea, a 7 year old child, and falls in love with him. He wants to be Andrea’s good father, the good father he himself never had. But his emotional delirium isn’t able to hold back his animal instinct. By pure ‘chance’, the detectives find the monster in the act of his last execution. On time?

movie.title: The Bait
movie.description: Tracy Fleming is a widowed police officer, with a young son, who has risen to the role of plainclothes operative. After six women have been raped and killed, Fleming agrees to go undercover in an effort to make herself a target for the killer. The climax places her in a life-and-death struggle with the killer.

movie.title: Killer Diller
movie.description: A guitar playing car thief meets an autistic savant piano player, and together they transform a group of reluctant halfway house convicts into The Killer Diller Blues Band.

movie.title: She Will Not Break
movie.description: Veronica, an aging film star, retreats to the Scottish countryside with her nurse Desi to recover from a double mastectomy. While there, mysterious forces give Veronica the power to enact revenge within her dreams.

movie.title: The Killing Mind
movie.description: Isobel Neiman, a former FBI agent turned cop, is assigned to catch a ballerina's murderer, but runs into resistance by fellow cops who don't think a woman detective can handle the case.

movie.title: Game Of Death
movie.description: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: 8 Million Dollars And One Deadly Grudge: The Ultimate Bank Heist
movie.description: Experimental music and eroticism swirl about each other in Shiver, the second of the 8 Million stories which can be found in this lively and continuing collaborative ‘album’. In Kiss of Fire , Child reworks images from her squisy TV soap Swamp (1991), to punctuate romantic cliche.” Selected for New York Film Festival Video Visions (1993) Short songs chart erotic tales in an urban topology. Includes FISHTANK, SHIVER, KISS OF FIRE, 8 MILLION WAYS TO DIE, and FAINT CLUE. The myths of popular culture—romance and TV soaps— provide the motifs for the work which restructures memory-image-fragment to foreground the body against a mechanized landscape. In the shape of small stories, 8 Million rewrites women's drama.. And on occasion to be the basis of the score: image as conductor, the music performed to the video.

movie.title: Acquitted By Faith
movie.description: Attorney Benjamin Stills is nearly sentenced to prison and finds faith in God after killing a teenage girl in an accidental car crash from texting while driving.

movie.title: Full
movie.description: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the U.S.-Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

movie.title: Greta Garbo
movie.description: "Greta Garbo" is a man who possesses the secret of a recipe, or an actor/actress who insists and hopes to always be a muse for someone. The illusion, the power that this creates, its allure, but also its sense of loneliness and insecurity that grips, and finally chooses vanity as a possible substitute for love. A project for Damir Todorovic - artist, actor and performer.

movie.title: Killer In The Woods
movie.description: To connect with her two teenage daughters, a single mother agrees to a camping trip suggested by her new, seemingly charming, boyfriend. When her daughter goes missing, the peace and calm she hoped for turns into a trip from hell.

movie.title: Walt Before Mickey
movie.description: Based on the book "Walt Before Mickey" covers the early years of Walt Disney's career. The legendary Walt Disney had a tumultuous childhood, yet he was determined to overcome obstacles in his path, before the creation of his first iconic character: Mickey Mouse.

movie.title: 【】2026 Action : Lone Female Paratrooper Lands Behind Enemy Lines And Wipes Out Terrorist Base
movie.description: A feature-length theatrical presentation for Academy Award® Short Film Live Action category, showcasing outstanding short films from around the world.

movie.title: Concealed
movie.description: Max, a struggling actor living in South Africa, has flown into Sydney, Australia for the audition of his life. As soon as he lands things start to go horribly wrong when his girlfriend Sallie disappears. Frustrated with the police’s lack of progress in finding her, Max embarks on a desperate search for Sallie with the help of childhood friend Richard. The pair’s search pushes them to both external and internal extremities in their desperate plight to find Sallie.

movie.title: 【】2026 Crime : Prisoners Escape To Freedom, But Discover The Entire City Overrun By Creatures
movie.description: Movie not found on TMDB.

movie.title: A Grieving Community
movie.description: A reflective portrait of a woman navigating life in New York City, this film traces her evolving relationship with loneliness in the digital age. It examines how our collective pursuit for connection through technology has become an inescapable loop, one where the systems we’ve built increasingly mirror our own contradictions. Through the interplay of natural v.s. technological patterns, the story explores the cyclical nature of self-destruction. At its heart, it is a meditation on complicity and control: how individuals knowingly return to the very technologies that harm them, and how humanity, in turn, condemns the machine for reflecting what we ourselves have created.

movie.title: Final Prey
movie.description: Daigo, a cellist, is laid off from his orchestra and moves with his wife back to his small hometown where the living is cheaper. Thinking he’s applying for a job at a travel agency he finds he’s being interviewed for work with departures of a more permanent nature – as an undertaker’s assistant.
